---
title: "Charlotte de Mornay"
---

## Charlotte de Mornay

**Dates:** (1550-1606)

**Maiden name:** (Arbaleste de la Borde)

### Description

biographer, wife of Philippe de Mornay, known as Duplessis Mornay

### Biography

She was the subject of a biography by Emily Taylor in the second series of <i>Biographies of Good Women</i> (1865).

### Letters

- Letter from June 29th 1863 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
